rules.name: Cancel_Ticked
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 8
rules.label: Cancel Ticked

fields.name: CancelText
fields.fieldText:
Alert

Once a shift is cancelled it will be removed and you will no longer be able to amend

fields.name: Heading
fields.fieldText: Use "Save" to update the shifts above Only use "Submit" at the end of the week.

textTemplates.name: ClientHours
textTemplates.text:
Approved Time's: {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}

Break Length (minutes): {!Shift_Loop.Break_from_Brekdef__c}

Total Approved Hours: {!Shift_Loop.Billable_hours_minus_breaks__c}

textTemplates.name: EmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi


Please be aware {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName} has submitted their hours for approval.


Use the link below to login and action this request:


https://myagencytemps.tate.co.uk/


Kind Regards

Tate

textTemplates.name: FridayText
textTemplates.text: {!Dayoftheweek} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Operating_Company__r.Name} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name} - {!Status}

textTemplates.name: MondayText
textTemplates.text: {!Dayoftheweek} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Operating_Company__r.Name} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name} - {!Status}

textTemplates.name: SaturdayText
textTemplates.text: {!Dayoftheweek} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Operating_Company__r.Name} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name} - {!Status}

textTemplates.name: SundayText
textTemplates.text: {!Dayoftheweek} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Operating_Company__r.Name} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name} - {!Status}

textTemplates.name: ThursdayText
textTemplates.text: {!Dayoftheweek} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Operating_Company__r.Name} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name} - {!Status}

textTemplates.text: {!Dayoftheweek} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Operating_Company__r.Name} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name} - {!Status}

textTemplates.name: WednesdayText
textTemplates.text: {!Dayoftheweek} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Operating_Company__r.Name} - {!Shift_Loop.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name} - {!Status}
